# Issue Body Template

```yaml
---
issue_type: feature
priority: high
estimated_effort: medium
affected_areas: []
---
```

## Goal

<!-- Clear statement of what this issue should achieve. -->

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? Why does it matter? -->

## Context

<!-- Relevant files, components, APIs, design systems, constraints. -->

## Success Criteria

<!-- Each item must be verifiable by tester. -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Design Spec

<!-- TBD — filled by design step -->

## Implementation Plan

<!-- Numbered, concrete steps with file paths and dependencies. -->
1. 
2. 

## Testing & Verification

<!-- Unit tests, E2E tests, manual checks, commands to run. -->

## Risks & Mitigations

<!-- What could go wrong and how to prevent it. -->

## Dependencies

- Depends on: #...
- Blocks: #...

## Notes

<!-- Additional context, decisions, open questions. -->
